test.name: Verify User Can Signup Successfully

kw.name: Launch Demoblaze Application
kw.msg: Opening browser and launching demoblaze application

kw.name: Verify Signup Success Alert
kw.msg: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: This user already exist. Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : This user already exist.} (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=148.0.3967.54) Stacktrace: msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791f80f15+e235] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791f80f74+e294] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7922fa65a+38797a] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791d2f5eb] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791cea30c] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791ce9566] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791cea133] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791db3e49] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791db0413] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff791dc0672] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791f9d498+2a7b8] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791fa5e86+331a6] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791f88274+15594] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791f88395+156b5] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff791f756a3+29c3] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff9cb9be957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9cc8a427c+2c]
